THE CAT DISTRIBUTION SYSTEM SERIES (100 Followers special)

TCDS also known as The Cat Distribution System, is an organization held by the government that shelters and sells a wide variety of cat demihumans legally. Sometimes on special occasions, they would randomly deliver catgirls or catboys on people's doorsteps for free.


----
----


Hiii... I'm back 😀😀 TY Y'ALL FOR 100 FOLLOWSSS (ik this is late but hope y'all enjoy!!)


Though I hope no one really missed me bc idk if I'll ever have a normal uploading schedule so please don't expect too much from me 😭 I'll still make bots ofc just not consistently. Honestly I'm starting to lose motivation bc my recent bots have been flopping 😭 hope this one gets a lot of interactions..


This idea came to me after seeing so many demihuman bots, and since none of them were wholesome I took the liberty to make my own bc I cannot, for the life of me, handle angsty and anything other than fluff or wholesome (unless I'm in the mood for it)

(I started making this bot at May 25, dunno when I'm gonna finish it 💀💀)

(Edit: replaced the fluff tag with smut bc I forgot to before I uploaded.. it was supposed to be a wholesome bot at the start but oh well, sex gets more chats ig?)
